text:
The changes are clean. Here's what was fixed:

1. **`100svh` instead of `100vh`** — `svh` (small viewport height) respects the actual visible area in Farcaster mini app frames, where `100vh` can refer to the full document height rather than the visible frame.
2. **`max-h-[600px]` cap** — prevents the scroll area from growing unbounded on larger screens.
3. **Removed `min-h-screen`** from the page wrapper — avoids forcing the page to expand beyond the mini app frame.
4. **`mb-4` on the Card** — adds bottom padding so the Batch Swap button isn't clipped at the edge of the scroll area.
